name: restaurant managers in small to medium-sized restaurants processing 5–15 food safety inspections/month tool
description: For restaurant managers in small to medium-sized restaurants processing 5–15 food safety inspections/month, manual tracking causes missed compliance deadlines. We automate compliance reminders instead of manual tracking of inspection scores and reminders.
target_audience: restaurant managers in small to medium-sized restaurants processing 5–15 food safety inspections/month
problem_solved: Ensuring compliance with food safety regulations and avoiding penalties.
features: simple dashboard for monitoring inspection status

locked_fields.primary_user: restaurant managers in small to medium-sized restaurants processing 5–15 food safety inspections/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Ensuring compliance with food safety regulations and avoiding penalties.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For restaurant managers in small to medium-sized restaurants processing 5–15 food safety inspections/month, manual tracking causes missed compliance deadlines. We automate compliance reminders instead of manual tracking of inspection scores and reminders.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of inspection scores and reminders
must_have_features: simple dashboard for monitoring inspection status

one_liner: For restaurant managers in small to medium-sized restaurants processing 5–15 food safety inspections/month, manual tracking causes missed compliance deadlines. We automate compliance reminders instead of manual tracking of inspection scores and reminders.
